positive: Minimalist graphic illustration of a celestial woodland creature, combining elements of a stylized fox, a mystical owl, and bioluminescent fungi. The creature is seated symmetrically at the center, surrounded by geometric, glowing roots and abstract constellation patterns. Style: Clean vector art, linocut print aesthetic mixed with ethereal glow effect. Composition: High contrast, strong black silhouettes against a deep indigo and midnight blue background. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting and soft, diffuse glowing points emanating from the fungi and roots. Color Direction: Limited palette of deep blues, emerald greens, mustard yellows, and stark white. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, copyright, messy, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, realism
